data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"1083-fb3d","generatedAt":"2026-04-27T15:53:14Z","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"Local workflow simplification: remove enforcement hooks and shift to PR-based merge","successCriteriaCount":9,"scopeExpansionDate":"2026-04-27","scopeExpansionSource":"C4 conflict resolution from docs/proposed-mitigations-4-26.md (PR-per-batch sub-criterion)"},"considerations":["[Reliability] gh pr merge --auto failure modes (cli/cli #8206, #8514) require explicit retry","[Reliability] PR merge race on stale HEAD (422) requires re-poll-and-retry","[Reliability] CI-red between batches blocks next batch with actionable surface","[Testing] Workflow scripts need integration coverage with stubbed gh CLI","[Maintainability] Merge primitive has 3 callers (sprint per-batch, end-session, manual) \u2014 define contract before 87ab-a487","[Maintainability] Sprint --resume idempotency shared between 8787-ac16 (detect existing PR) and 87ab-a487 (state on resume)","[Performance] Inter-batch CI latency is sprint cadence floor \u2014 surface 'waiting on CI' status","[Security] No new attack surface; CI enforcement replaces local hooks 1:1","[Coordination] 5428-bebd and 8787-ac16 both touch COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md \u2014 sequence to avoid conflict"],"researchFindings":[],"stories":[],"qualitativeOverrideCheck":{"multiplePersonas":true,"uiAndBackend":false,"newDbMigration":false,"foundationEnhancementCandidate":false,"externalIntegration":true,"result":"complex_already_classified","escalationDecision":"no_escalate","rationale":"Epic was previously classified COMPLEX by brainstorm evaluator and decomposed into 5 child stories. Lightweight enrichment refreshes done definitions and considerations; no missed override warrants ESCALATED."}}
